name: RSx4S / BSx4S Servos
description: KO Propo RSx4S / BSx4S servos. No PC software - set from an EX-NEXT via REAL TIME ICS, the LCD Expansion Unit 2, or the 4S Servo Model Selector.
notes: Hardware-only device: no downloadable PC configuration software. KO states this outright on the product page - unlike the earlier RSx/BSx series, the 4S generation cannot be configured with ICS Servo Manager over a PC. Catalogued so owners stop hunting for software that does not exist; for the PC-programmable earlier servos see kopropo-ics-servo-manager.
